column1:
Insurance bets are offered whenever the dealer shows an ace. They are half your bet, and pay 2 to 1 odds.

You may split a pair or surrender whenever you have only two cards.

You may double down if your cards total 10 or 11 points.
column2:
Insurance bets are offered whenever the dealer shows an ace. They are half your bet, and pay 2 to 1 odds.

You may double down if your cards total 10 or 11 points.

column1:
Press F4 when ready to play.

Press F6 for another card.

Press F8 to stand.

To change the amount of your bet, type "change bet."
column2:
